{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Shifting Skies
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of the Shifting Skies]] is a blend of cloud, wind, and water madra.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of the Shifting Skies]] arm is a [[Highgold]] arm.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
